reference: Hello, brain swelling is not the meaningful term, but yes, paints or their vapors can definitely cause dizziness and nose irritation. You should wear a face mask, that is, protective equipment; then there will be no need for medical treatment. Something about brain swelling would be very rare.
text: Hello, brain swelling is not a meaningful term, but yes, paints or their vapors can definitely cause dizziness and nose irritation. You should wear a face mask, that is protective equipment, then there will be no need for medical treatment. Something about brain swelling would be very rare.
